bucket.name: published_by entity->source
bucket.cleanup_direction: data cleanup only; do not widen published_by beyond source|project|entity -> entity
bucket.rationale: The source-backed fact is publication of a document by MTA. The original relation reversed the validator-compatible shape by making the MTA entity the subject and the source document the object. A source -> entity published_by replacement preserves the fact using an already accepted source local id and same-source MTA entity local id.

checkpoint_context.reported_checkpoint: Current state is after identity071, relation039, and the owned_by corridor rule patch, with unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape at 33.

endpoint_shape_probe.published_by entity->source: Relation kind published_by expects source|project|entity -> entity, got entity -> source.

checkpoint_context.owned_by_corridor_rule_context: Current relationEndpointShapeIssue rules admit owned_by corridor -> entity; this batch does not touch owned_by rows.

local_validation.tooling: createSubmissionEntry dry-run for one corrected published_by source->entity relation replacement, with relationEndpointIssues using accepted same-source local ids and direct relationEndpointShapeIssue probe for original and replacement shapes.

retire.original_object_name: Monthly Pulse Survey: Subways and Buses

proposed_retired_json_entry.reason: Codex relation cleanup batch040 replaces malformed published_by entity -> source relation relation_mta-published-source_5 with validator-compatible source -> entity published_by relation preserving the Monthly Pulse Survey publisher context.

source_evidence.source_quote: The MTA logo, consisting of the letters 'MTA' in white, bold, sans-serif font, is centered within a dark blue circle.
The MTA logo, consisting of the letters 'MTA' in white on a dark blue circular background.

retire.reason: published_by already expresses document-to-publisher context. Reversing the endpoints to source -> entity preserves the source literal and matches current endpoint rules.

tool_args.label: Monthly Pulse Survey published by MTA
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA logo appears on the document, identifying MTA as the publisher of the Monthly Pulse Survey.

payload.description: Replacement for malformed published_by entity -> source relation; the source document is the Monthly Pulse Survey and MTA is the publisher indicated by the document logo.

command_evidence.output_excerpt: unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape count is 33; selected row relation_mta-published-source_5 is published_by with entity subject and source object.
Current endpoint rules show published_by expects source|project|entity -> entity and owned_by expects entity|project|corridor -> entity.

command_evidence.command: sqlite3 -readonly data/canonical.db "SELECT r.record_id, r.record_kind, rel.relation_kind, rel.subject_id, rs.record_kind AS subject_kind, rel.object_id, ro.record_kind AS object_kind FROM relations rel JOIN records r ON r.record_id=rel.record_id LEFT JOIN records rs ON rs.record_id=rel.subject_id LEFT JOIN records ro ON ro.record_id=rel.object_id WHERE r.record_id='relation_mta-published-source_5';"

command_evidence.output_excerpt: Confirmed p001_c0002 and p006_c0005 are MTA-logo evidence blocks for meeting_doc_92021.
